ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "org_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., non-profit, for-profit, government) */,
  "parent_org_id" INTEGER /* Parent organization ID */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "ind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the individual resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the individual resides */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the individual */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation (e.g., organization, political party) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "political_party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "pos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "ind_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual holding the position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization where the position is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_ind_id FOREIGN KEY ("ind_id") REFERENCES individuals ("ind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "con_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the contribution (individual or organization) */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the contribution (individual or organization) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the contribution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the contribution (e.g., campaign, lobbying) */,
  "contribution_method" TEXT /* Method of contribution (e.g., cash, check, online) */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("con_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES contribution_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES funding_recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES contribution_purposes ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lobbyists" (
  "lob_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lobbyist */,
  "ind_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual registered as a lobbyist */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the lobbyist represents */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the lobbyist was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lobbyist (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "lobbyist_type" TEXT /* Type of lobbyist (e.g., individual, firm) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the lobbyist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lob_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lobbyists_ind_id FOREIGN KEY ("ind_id") REFERENCES individuals ("ind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lobbyists_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lobbyist_principals" (
  "prin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal */,
  "lob_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lobbyist representing the principal */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the principal is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the representation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the representation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the principal */,
  "principal_type" TEXT /* Type of principal (e.g., organization, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lobbyist_principals_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lobbyist_principals_lob_id FOREIGN KEY ("lob_id") REFERENCES lobbyists ("lob_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the funding source (e.g., individual, organization, PAC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the funding source (e.g., individual, organization, PAC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of the recipient (e.g., individual, organization, campaign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipient */,
  "recipient_category" TEXT /* Category of the recipient (e.g., individual, organization, campaign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the contribution type (e.g., campaign, lobbying) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution purpose */,
  "purpose_category" TEXT /* Category of the contribution purpose (e.g., lobbying, campaign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., contribution, position, lobbyist) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, compliance) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
